# OCR Extraction  Accuracy Metrics

**Status: harness ready, dataset pending.** This file is regenerated by
`npx tsx tools/ocrEval/score.ts` once a labeled dataset exists (30–50 real
Malaysian bank/e-wallet screenshots  see README.md for the three steps).
The scoring core is unit-tested on synthetic fixtures
(`__tests__/ocrEval.test.ts`); the numbers below will be real, internal
figures ("our figures"), measured through the exact production extraction
path, and **not tuned** against the eval set.

## Results (overall)

_Pending dataset  run steps 1–3 in README.md._

| Metric | Value |
|--------|-------|
| Screenshots evaluated |  |
| Ground-truth rows |  |
| Rows detected (aligned) |  |
| **Missed rows** (in truth, not extracted) |  |
| **Hallucinated rows** (extracted, not in truth) |  |

Field accuracy over aligned rows: amount  · date  · direction  · merchant 

## Mitigations in the product

Every extraction lands on a review screen where the user corrects rows before
saving, and provenance weighting means screenshot-derived data never carries
verified-source trust.
